metric_notes.2d_err_px: Euclidean pixel error per joint; selected hand is chosen by lowest 2D error among expected handedness candidates.
metric_notes.pa_mpjpe_mm: Per-sample mean 3D joint error after similarity(Procrustes) alignment, in millimeters.
metric_notes.root_mpjpe_mm: Per-sample mean 3D joint error after wrist/root alignment only, in millimeters.
